item.name: Calculations
Factset Create and Run Quant Engine Calculation

request.name: Factset Create and Run Quant Engine Calculation

description.content:
This endpoint runs the Quant Engine calculation specified in the POST body parameters.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

header.description: Standard HTTP header.  Accepts no-store, max-age, max-stale.

response.name: Expected response if the calculation has one unit and is completed with an error.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

header.description: Standard HTTP header.  Accepts no-store, max-age, max-stale.
FactSet's request key header.
Key to uniquely identify an Analytics API request. Only available after successful authentication.
Number of allowed requests for the time window.
Number of requests left for the time window.
Number of seconds remaining till rate limit resets.

item.name: Factset Create or Update Quant Engine Calculation and Run It.

request.name: Factset Create or Update Quant Engine Calculation and Run It.

description.content:
This endpoint updates and runs the Quant Engine calculation specified in the PUT body parameters. This also allows creating new Quant Engine calculations with custom ids.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

variable.description: (Required) from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run Quant Engine calculation endpoint

header.description: Standard HTTP header.  Accepts no-store, max-age, max-stale.

item.name: Factset Get Quant Engine Calculation Status by Id

request.name: Factset Get Quant Engine Calculation Status by Id

description.content:
This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previously requested calculation.
If the calculation has finished computing, the location header will point to the result url.
Otherwise, the calculation is still running and the X-FactSet-Api-PickUp-Progress header will contain a progress percentage.

variable.description: (Required) from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run Quant Engine calculation endpoint

response.name: Expected response once calculation is completed.

variable.description: (Required) from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run Quant Engine calculation endpoint

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

header.description: Standard HTTP header. Header value based on Accept-Encoding Request header.
Standard HTTP header. Header value will be set to Chunked if Accept-Encoding header is specified.
FactSet's request key header.
Key to uniquely identify an Analytics API request. Only available after successful authentication.
Number of allowed requests for the time window.
Number of requests left for the time window.
Number of seconds remaining till rate limit resets.

response.name: Expected response returned if the calculation is not yet completed, should contain X-FactSet-Api-PickUp-Progress header.

variable.description: (Required) from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run Quant Engine calculation endpoint

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

header.description: FactSet's progress header.
Standard HTTP header. Header will specify max-age in seconds. Polling can be adjusted based on the max-age value.

item.name: Status
Factset Get Quant Engine Calculation Status by Id

request.name: Factset Get Quant Engine Calculation Status by Id

description.content:
This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previously requested calculation.
If the calculation has finished computing, the location header will point to the result url.
Otherwise, the calculation is still running and the X-FactSet-Api-PickUp-Progress header will contain a progress percentage.

response.name: Expected response once calculation is completed.
